name: Snyk PHP Security Scan

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - main

  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - main

  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  security:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout código
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup PHP
        uses: shivammathur/setup-php@v2
        with:
          php-version: '8.2'

      - name: Validar Composer
        run: composer validate

      - name: Instalar dependências
        run: composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

      - name: Instalar Snyk CLI
        run: npm install -g snyk

      - name: Executar scan Snyk
        env:
          SNYK_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SECRET_SNYK }}
        run: |
          snyk test \
            --file=composer.lock \
            --severity-threshold=medium

      - name: Monitorar projeto
        if: success()
        env:
          SNYK_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SECRET_SNYK }}
        run: snyk monitor --file=composer.lock

      # =========================
      # SONARQUBE SCAN
      # =========================

      - name: SonarQube Scan
        uses: SonarSource/sonarqube-scan-action@v5
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SECRET_SONAR }}
          
      # =========================
      # QUALITY GATE
      # =========================

      - name: SonarQube Quality Gate
        uses: SonarSource/sonarqube-quality-gate-action@v1.2.0
        timeout-minutes: 5
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SECRET_SONAR }}
